originalTitle: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
title: Ghana's Big Safety Friendship!
content:
Hello, amazing friends! This is your kid-friendly news reporter, bringing you super exciting news from our wonderful continent, Africa! Guess what? Something super important just happened in Ghana, a beautiful country in West Africa.

A Super Special Promise for Safety!

Ghana and a big group of friends from far away, called the European Union (EU), made a special promise to work together. This promise is all about keeping everyone safe and sound! It’s like when you and your friends promise to look out for each other on the playground. It’s a very grown-up and important way for countries to be friends and help each other.

What is this 'Safety Plan'?

Imagine you and your friends want to play in the park, but some naughty people are trying to cause trouble or make others feel unsafe. What do you do? You might ask a grown-up, like a teacher or your parents, for help, right? That's a bit like what Ghana did! They made a very smart plan with the EU to protect people from bad groups that try to cause harm and make everyone afraid. It's like saying, "We will all work together, share ideas, and make sure our homes and towns are peaceful and happy!" This isn't about fighting, but about learning how to keep trouble away. It's about making sure that kids can go to school, parents can go to work, and everyone can sleep soundly at night without worry. It means they will share good ways to keep watch and stop problems before they start. It's all about peace and protection! *Did you know?* This plan means they will share ideas and help each other learn how to keep bad people away, just like you learn new things at school!

Meet Ghana! A Bright African Star!

Ghana is such a bright and happy country right here in West Africa. It has lovely sandy beaches where the ocean waves crash, yummy food like jollof rice that makes your tummy happy, and super friendly people who always have a smile! The Vice-President of Ghana, Dr. Mahamudu Bawumia, is a very important leader who helps run the country. He was there when this big safety promise was made, representing all the wonderful people of Ghana. Ghana wants all its kids to go to school, play happily with their friends, and grow up in a peaceful and safe home. This new safety plan will help them achieve that dream for every child and every family. They are working hard to build a country where everyone feels protected and can thrive. *Did you know?* Ghana is famous for its delicious cocoa beans, which are used to make chocolate all around the world! Yum! Many yummy treats start their journey in Ghana.

Meet the EU! Friends from Far Away!

The EU is like a big team or a club of many, many countries far away in Europe. Think of it as a super-sized group of friends who decided to work together on many things. They help each other with trade, so their countries can share goods, and they even help each other travel easily. And now, they are working together on safety! These countries want to help make the world a safer place, not just for themselves but for their friends around the world, like Ghana. They believe that by working together, they can solve big problems and help everyone live in peace. It’s a wonderful example of friendship crossing oceans. *Did you know?* The EU has many countries, and they all work together like a big family! They even have a special flag with blue and yellow stars, showing how they are all connected.

Why is this a Big Deal for Ghana?

This safety plan is super, super important for Ghana because it means more protection and more security for everyone. It's like having more grown-up helpers looking out for you, or more brave police officers keeping an eye out for trouble. When people feel safe, they can do so many wonderful things! Kids can go to school every day without worry, parents can go to work and earn money to take care of their families, and everyone can live without fear. It helps the whole country grow strong, happy, and prosperous. Ghana will also learn new and better ways to keep its people safe, sharing ideas and knowledge with its new friends from the EU. This kind of learning and sharing makes everyone stronger. *Did you know?* When a country is safe and peaceful, more people want to visit and learn about its culture, its history, and its beautiful places! This is good for everyone.

Ghana is First! Wow!

Here's one of the most exciting parts of this news! Ghana is the FIRST country in all of Africa to make this kind of special safety promise with the EU. That's a huge deal! It means Ghana is showing the way for other African countries, setting a fantastic example of how to make friends and work together for peace. It's like being the first one to score a goal in a football game – everyone looks up to you and wants to learn from you! This makes Ghana a very special friend to the EU and a leader in Africa. This shows that Ghana is smart and brave, always looking for the best ways to keep its people protected. Other countries will now look at Ghana and maybe think, "Hey, we can do that too!" It inspires everyone to work for peace. *Did you know?* Being "first" often means you are a leader and set a good example for others to follow! Ghana is a leader in making the continent safer.

What Does This Mean for Us?

This news is full of hope and happiness! It shows us that countries can work together, even if they are far apart and speak different languages, to make the world a better and safer place for kids like you, for families, and for everyone. It means more peace, more learning, and more chances for everyone to live happily ever after. When leaders make good choices and work together, everyone benefits! This kind of friendship and cooperation helps us build a future where everyone can feel safe, loved, and have the opportunity to chase their dreams. Let's celebrate Ghana and its new friends from the EU for this wonderful step towards a safer world for all! *Did you know?* When countries are friends, they can share resources and ideas to solve big problems together, like making sure everyone has enough food or clean water!
summary: Ghana and the European Union have signed a special friendship deal to work together and keep people safe from trouble, making Ghana the very first African country to do so.
whyMatters: This is important because it means Ghana will be even safer for kids to play and learn, and it shows that countries can be friends and help each other make the world a more peaceful place for everyone.

originalTitle: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
title: Our Hero Mo Salah Says Goodbye to Liverpool!
content:
Jambo, amazing kids of Africa! It’s your friendly news reporter here. Today, we have some big news about a very special football player. He is from Africa, just like many of us! His name is Mohamed Salah. Many people call him Mo Salah. He is a superstar! Mo Salah is a famous football player. He plays with a big, round ball on a green field. He runs very fast and scores many goals. Goals are when the ball goes into the net! When Mo Salah scores, everyone cheers loudly. He makes people very happy. Mo Salah comes from a country called Egypt. Egypt is a big country in Africa. So, Mo Salah is an African hero! He makes all of Africa proud when he plays football. He shows us that big dreams can come true.

Mo Salah, Our African Football Star!

Mo Salah plays football like magic! He is very good at it. When he has the ball, it looks like he is dancing. He dribbles the ball around other players. Then, *whoosh!* He kicks it right into the goal. It is so exciting to watch him play. He wears a special uniform, just like all football players. His team wears a red uniform. Red is a very bright colour! His number is 11. Can you count to 11? One, two, three... all the way to eleven! That's his lucky number. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole world! Many, many people love to watch football. Maybe you love to play football too! All you need is a ball and some friends.

What is Liverpool?

Mo Salah plays for a team called Liverpool. Liverpool is a famous football team. It is in a country called England. England is very far away from Africa, across the big ocean. But many people in Africa cheer for Liverpool because Mo Salah plays there! Liverpool has a big stadium. A stadium is like a giant playground where football games happen. Many thousands of people go to the stadium to watch the games. They sing songs and shout for their team. It is a very exciting place! The fans of Liverpool are very special. They love their team very, very much. They love Mo Salah too! They always cheer for him. They wear red shirts to show they are Liverpool fans. Red is their team colour! Did you know? A football team has 11 players on the field at one time! Plus, they have more players who can come in if someone gets tired. It takes a big team to win a game!

Saying Goodbye to Liverpool

Now, we have some news from Mo Salah. He has told everyone that he will be leaving Liverpool. Leaving means he will not play for this team anymore. He will finish playing for Liverpool at the end of this football season. It's a bit like when you finish one school year and get ready for a new one. Or when a friend moves to a new house. It can be a little bit sad, but it also means new adventures! Mo Salah has played for Liverpool for a very long time. He joined them many, many years ago. He has scored so many goals for them. He has helped them win many big football trophies. Trophies are like big shiny cups that teams win when they are the best!

Thank You, Fans!

Mo Salah said some very kind words to the Liverpool fans. He said they "gave me the best time of my life." This means he was very, very happy playing for them. He had so much fun and made many happy memories. He also said the fans "stood by me in the toughest times." Toughest times means when things were hard. Maybe when he didn't score a goal, or when his team lost a game. Even then, the fans cheered for him. They showed him love and support. This is very important. It shows that even when things are not easy, good friends and fans will always be there for you. They help you feel strong again. Mo Salah felt very loved by the Liverpool fans. Did you know? When football players score a goal, sometimes they do a special dance! It's called a goal celebration. Mo Salah has his own special ways of celebrating. It's fun to watch!

Why Mo Salah is Special to Africa

Mo Salah is more than just a football player. He is an inspiration. He shows all of us, especially children in Africa, that you can achieve your dreams. He worked very hard to become a great player. He comes from Egypt, right here on our amazing continent of Africa. When he plays, we feel like one of our own is shining brightly on the world stage. He reminds us that Africa has many talented people. Many children in Africa look up to Mo Salah. They want to be like him. They play football in their backyards, on dusty fields, imagining they are Mo Salah, scoring the winning goal. He gives them hope and courage. Did you know? Egypt is famous for its pyramids! They are very old and very big buildings. They are one of the wonders of the world! Mo Salah grew up in a country with amazing history.

What Happens Next for Mo Salah?

So, what will Mo Salah do now? He will find a new team to play for! Just like when you finish one big project and start a new one. He will go to a different team in a different place. He will put on a new uniform with new colours. He will make new friends with new teammates. He will score goals for a new team. It will be a new adventure for him! We don't know where he will go yet, but we know he will keep playing amazing football. We are sure he will keep making Africa proud, wherever he plays. His talent and his kind heart will go with him. We wish him all the best in his new journey. It will be exciting to see what he does next!

We Will Miss You, Mo!

It is a little sad to say goodbye to Mo Salah at Liverpool. But it is also a time to remember all the wonderful things he did. All the goals he scored, all the smiles he brought to people's faces. He is a true champion. A champion is someone who is the best and who never gives up. Mo Salah is definitely a champion! We thank him for all the happy memories he gave to Liverpool and to football fans around the world, especially here in Africa. Thank you for listening, wonderful children! Keep dreaming big, just like Mo Salah! See you next time for more exciting news!
summary: African football star Mohamed Salah is leaving his team, Liverpool, at the end of the season, after many years of making fans happy and scoring amazing goals.
whyMatters: This is important because Mo Salah is a hero from Africa, who taught us to dream big and work hard, and now he is starting a new exciting adventure that will keep making Africa proud.

originalTitle: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
title: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
content: Namibia's regulator noted that Starlink's subsidiary is not locally owned.

title: US to send thousands of soldiers from 82nd Airborne Division to Middle East
content: The US is expected to deploy up to 3,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East.

originalTitle: Iran says ‘non-hostile’ ships can pass safely through Strait of Hormuz
title: Super Happy News About Big Ships and a Special Water Path!
content:
Hello, my super amazing friends and future leaders across Africa! It’s your friendly news reporter, zooming in from our wonderful continent, ready to share some really good news with you! Are you ready for a story about big boats, special water roads, and people talking to be friends? Let's go!

Hello, Everyone!

Imagine you have a toy boat, and you want to sail it from one side of your bathtub to the other. Easy, right? Now, imagine that boat is HUGE, bigger than your whole school! And it needs to sail across a very, very big ocean, carrying lots of cool things like your favourite juice, new shoes, or even parts for a big car! This is what happens every day in the real world. Giant ships sail across huge oceans, bringing important stuff from one country to another. And guess what? Sometimes, these ships need to pass through special, narrow water roads, just like how cars need to use certain roads to get where they are going.

What is the Strait of Hormuz?

Today, we have good news about one of these super important water roads! It's called the Strait of Hormuz. Can you say that with me? Hor-muz! It's a special, narrow part of the sea, far away from Africa, but still very important for everyone in the world, even us! Think of the Strait of Hormuz like a very important gate or a narrow bridge over the water. It connects a big ocean to a smaller sea. Many, many ships, carrying all sorts of things, need to use this gate to pass through. It’s like a super busy highway for boats!

Why is this Water Path Important?

“But why is it important for us?” you might ask. Well, these big ships often carry things that are super useful for us in Africa. For example, they carry oil, which helps make fuel for our cars, buses, and trucks. They also carry parts for computers, clothes, and even yummy food ingredients! So, if ships can't pass through this special water road easily, it can make it harder for these things to reach our homes and shops. Did you know? The ocean covers most of our Earth! It’s home to amazing creatures like whales and colourful fish, and it’s also a giant highway for ships!

Good News from Iran!

Now, for the really good news! There’s a country far away called Iran. And the people in charge of Iran have said something wonderful. They said that ships that are ‘non-hostile’ can pass safely through the Strait of Hormuz. What does 'non-hostile' mean? It just means friendly ships! Ships that are not trying to cause any trouble, ships that are just doing their job, carrying goods and going from one place to another. These friendly ships are welcome to pass through this important water path without any worries! This is super news because it means that all those important things we talked about – like fuel for cars and lovely clothes – can keep moving across the world safely. It means the big ocean highways are open for friendly travel!

What Does 'Safely Pass' Mean?

'Safely pass' means that the ships won't be in any danger. They can go through the Strait of Hormuz and continue their journey without anyone bothering them. It's like when you walk on a safe path to school, knowing you won't get into any trouble. For captains of big ships, knowing they can pass safely is very, very important. It helps them do their job well and bring all the important cargo to its destination. Did you know? Some cargo ships are so big, they can carry thousands of containers! Each container is like a giant box filled with things that will travel all over the world!

Leaders are Talking About Peace!

There's even more good news! The leader of another big country, America, whose name is President Trump, said that people are having 'talks.' What are 'talks'? Talks are when people sit down together and speak to each other to solve problems. It's like when you talk to your friend if you have a disagreement, instead of shouting or fighting. These leaders are having talks because they want to make sure everyone can be friends and that there is no fighting. They want to 'end the war,' which means they want to stop any disagreements and make sure everyone can live in peace. When people talk and listen to each other, it's a great way to solve problems and make the world a happier, safer place for everyone, including you and me! Did you know? Talking and listening are two of the best ways to solve problems with your friends and family! Leaders use these same skills to solve problems between countries!

Why This Is Great News for Everyone!

So, this news is like a big, warm hug for the world! It means that a very important water road is open for friendly ships. It means that leaders are talking to make sure there's peace and no more fighting. This is good because it helps keep things moving, helps us get the things we need, and most importantly, it shows that people want to be friends and live in peace. Peace means people are happy and safe, and everyone can help each other grow. It's a wonderful thing when countries talk and agree to keep important paths like the Strait of Hormuz open and safe. It helps all of us, no matter where we live on this big, beautiful Earth. Keep shining bright, my African friends! That’s all for now from your super news reporter. Stay curious and remember to be friendly, just like the ships passing safely through the Strait of Hormuz! Bye for now!
summary: Iran has announced that friendly ships can safely use the Strait of Hormuz, a very important water path for big boats carrying goods all around the world, while leaders are also talking to bring peace and end fighting.
whyMatters: This is important because the Strait of Hormuz is like a busy water highway where ships carry things like fuel and toys to different countries, including parts of Africa; when it's safe, everyone can get the things they need, and when leaders talk, it helps countries be friends and stops fighting.

originalTitle: Premier League great Salah will leave lifetime of memories
title: Our African Hero Mo Salah: A Superstar's Story!
content:
Hello, super kids of Africa! Are you ready for some exciting news about a real-life hero? Today, we are talking about a very special football player from our very own continent: Mohamed Salah! You might know him as Mo Salah! He plays football like magic and makes everyone happy. Guess what? Our friend Mo Salah, who plays for a big, famous team in England called Liverpool, has made so many wonderful memories for people. He is known as one of the best players ever to play for Liverpool! He is a true superstar and a hero to many children and grown-ups all over the world, especially right here in Africa. Even if he goes to play for a new team one day, we will always remember his amazing time and all the good things he did.

Our Amazing African Star!

Mohamed Salah is from a beautiful country in Africa called Egypt. He started playing football when he was a little boy, just like some of you might be doing now with your friends! He loved kicking the ball and running fast. He practiced very, very hard every single day to become super good. And guess what? All that hard work paid off! He grew up to become one of the most famous football players on Earth! When he plays, he makes us all so proud. He shows everyone that children from Africa can grow up to be champions and do amazing things. He is like a shining star from our continent, showing everyone how bright we can be. Did you know? Egypt is a very old country in Africa, famous for its big pyramids and the long River Nile!

What is Football Anyway?

For our youngest friends, let's talk about football! Football is a super fun game played with a round ball. Two teams try to kick the ball into the other team's net, which is called a goal. The team that scores more goals wins! Mo Salah is super, super good at scoring goals. The Premier League is like the biggest and most exciting football competition in England. Imagine the best schools playing against each other, but for football! Liverpool is one of those very best teams. Mo Salah helped them become champions in this big competition. It's a huge achievement!

Mo Salah's Super Skills!

What makes Mo Salah so special? Oh, so many things! First, he is incredibly fast. When he runs with the ball, it looks like he's flying! He can dribble the ball, which means he moves it with his feet very skillfully, past many other players. It's like watching a magician with the ball. Then, he scores lots and lots of goals! He has a special way of kicking the ball that makes it fly right into the net. Every time he scores, the fans cheer super loudly, and everyone gets very excited. He helps his team win many games and competitions. His skills are truly incredible, and he always tries his best. Scoring a goal is like getting a gold star in school, but even bigger because millions of people are watching and cheering for him!

Making Lots of Happy Memories

When we talk about 'memories,' we mean all the happy times and special moments we remember in our hearts. Mo Salah has given Liverpool fans, and all football fans, so many happy memories. Think about all the times he scored a winning goal right at the end of a game, or when he helped his team win big, shiny trophies! He helped Liverpool win the Champions League, which is a very, very big competition where the best teams from all over Europe play. He also helped them win the Premier League, which they hadn't won for a very long time! These were super happy moments that people will talk about for many, many years. He made history with his team. Did you know? A trophy is a special cup or award you get for winning a big competition, like a prize for being the best!

More Than Just Goals: A Kind Heart

Mo Salah is not just famous for his amazing football skills. He is also known for being a very kind and good person. He often helps people in his home country of Egypt and does many good deeds. He shows us that even if you are a big star, it's important to be humble and help others. He always has a big smile, and he is a great role model. A role model is someone who sets a good example for others to follow. Mo Salah shows us to work hard, be kind, and never give up on our dreams. He respects his teammates and his opponents, which is very important in sports.

Our African Pride

Why is Mo Salah so important to us, here in Africa? Because he is one of us! He shows the whole world the amazing talent and spirit that comes from our continent. When he plays, it's not just Egypt cheering; it's all of Africa! He makes us all stand tall with pride. He inspires many young boys and girls across Africa to dream big. Maybe one day, you too can become a great football player, or a great doctor, or a great teacher, just like Mo Salah followed his dream. He proves that with hard work and dedication, anything is possible. He is truly a hero who shines brightly for all of Africa. Did you know? Africa is the second-largest continent in the world, with many different countries, cultures, and languages!

What Happens Next?

Sometimes, football players move to new teams to try new challenges. Even if Mo Salah decides to move from Liverpool one day, his amazing goals, his happy smile, and all the wonderful memories he created will stay with us forever. He will always be a 'legend' – like a superhero in the world of football – for Liverpool and for all of Africa. We will always cheer for our African hero, no matter which team he plays for next. He has left a special mark in our hearts and in the history books. Let's keep cheering for Mo Salah and for all our African heroes!
summary: Mohamed Salah, an amazing football star from Egypt, is celebrated as a great hero for Liverpool and all of Africa, leaving behind many happy memories with his incredible goals and kind heart.
whyMatters: This matters because Mohamed Salah shows us that African children can grow up to be superstars and achieve their biggest dreams with hard work, making all of Africa very proud.

originalTitle: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Bompastor
title: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Bompastor
content: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor says the women's game needs "more respect" after her side have a goal controversially disallowed in their Women's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal.
